name: Kill 'Em All
description: DEFAULT · Wipe every rival. No turn limit — game ends only when one empire remains.

name: Sector Rush
description: Timed · Most sectors when the clock hits turn 40 (or sole survivor sooner).

name: Cash Kings
description: Timed · Richest overlord after 36 turns wins (or sole survivor sooner).

name: Triple Threat
description: Timed · Highest score (sectors×50 + cash + support×10) after 45 turns. Two rivals.

name: War Zone
description: Elimination only · Three rivals. No turn clock. Last empire standing.
